zh.lifeSummary: 當Raymond de POITIERS Prince d'Antioche於1105年出生在法國波特芝士波爾斯時，他的父親Guillaume IX Duc d'Aquitaine34歲，母親Philippa de Toulouse32歲。他和Constance OF ANTIOCH至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1149年6月29日在敘利亞h阿拉布馬亞梅享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Raymond de POITIERS Prince d'Antioche于1105年出生在法国波特芝士波爾斯时，他的父亲Guillaume IX Duc d'Aquitaine34岁，母亲Philippa de Toulouse32岁。他和Constance OF ANTIOCH至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1149年6月29日在叙利亚h阿拉布馬亞梅享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: POITIERS
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: variant of Poitiers, a habitational name from Poitiers, a city in Vienne. This surname, which is rare in France, is most common in the Bahamas.

nameMeanings.name: Raymond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Raimund, of Germanic origin, from ragin ‘advice, decision’ + mund ‘protector’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. Subsequently it dropped out of use, but was revived in the middle of the 19th century, together with several other given names of Old English and Norman origin.

en.lifeSummary: When Raymond de POITIERS Prince d'Antioche was born in 1105, in Poitiers, Poitou, France, his father, Guillaume IX Duc d'Aquitaine, was 34 and his mother, Philippa de Toulouse, was 32. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Constance OF ANTIOCH. He died on 29 June 1149, in Maryamayn, Ḩalab, Syria, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Raymond de POITIERS Prince d'Antioche est né en 1105, à Poitiers, Poitou, France, son père, Guillaume IX Duc d'Aquitaine, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Philippa de Toulouse, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Constance OF ANTIOCH. Il est décédé le 29 juin 1149, à Maryamayn, Ḩalab, Syrie, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Raymond de POITIERS Prince d'Antioche 1105 in Poitiers, Poitou, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume IX Duc d'Aquitaine 34 und seine Mutter Philippa de Toulouse 32. Er hatte mit Constance OF ANTIOCH mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 29. Juni 1149 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Maryamayn, Ḩalab, Syrien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Raymond de POITIERS Prince d'Antioche è nato il nel 1105 nel Poitiers, Poitou, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume IX Duc d'Aquitaine, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Philippa de Toulouse, aveva 32 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Constance OF ANTIOCH. Morì il 29 giugno 1149, nel Maryamayn, Ḩalab, Siria, all'età di 44 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Raymond de POITIERS Prince d'Antioche(이)가 1105년 프랑스 포이토우 포이티어스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume IX Duc d'Aquitaine(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Philippa de Toulouse(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Constance OF ANTIOCH(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1149년 6월 29일 시리아 h알라브 마야메이에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Raymond de POITIERS Prince d'Antioche родился в 1105 г. в местности поитиирс, поитоу, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume IX Duc d'Aquitaine было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Philippa de Toulouse, 32. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Constance OF ANTIOCH. Он умер 29 июня 1149 г. в местности мэрямеин, hалаб, Сирия в возрасте 44 лет.
